cases.title: Organizer views certificate-eligible participant list with reasons per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Completed event with mandatory feedback and at least one Attended participant who submitted feedback
Eligibility evaluation has run or will be triggered on list
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with event scope
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.listEligibility(eventId, { page: "1", pageSize: "20" }, organizerAdminContext)
Locate list entry for the eligible registrationId
cases.expected: Paginated result includes entry with eligibility.result Eligible, non-empty reasonCode, and non-empty reasonText; satisfies testing-plan §3 row: Organizer views eligible list → list + reasons available (AC-10a)

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin listEligibility persists and returns Eligible row with reason from certificate_eligibilities
preconditions: Completed event with mandatory feedback and at least one Attended participant who submitted feedback
certificate_eligibilities row exists or will be created on list access
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with event scope
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.listEligibility(eventId, { page: "1", pageSize: "20" }, organizerAdminContext)
Query certificate_eligibilities table for the eligible registrationId in the same database session
cases.expected: Paginated result and persisted row both show eligibility.result Eligible with non-empty reasonCode and reasonText; module-integration boundary per eligibility module transaction contract (AC-10a)

cases.title: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility returns HTTP 200 paginated envelope with reason fields
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated Eligible participant
OrganizerAdmin JWT with scope to the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=1&pageSize=20 with organizer Authorization bearer token
Verify HTTP status, paginated envelope fields, and eligibility payload on matching item
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items, page, pageSize, total, totalPages; matching item has eligibility.result Eligible, non-empty reasonCode, and non-empty reasonText per API design §2.4 and §3 (AC-10a)

cases.title: Flow A organizer eligibility list shows Eligible row with reasons after full lifecycle
preconditions: E2E Flow A progressed through publish, registration, check-in, event completion, and feedback submission
OrganizerAdmin JWT with scope to the event
Event configured with feedbackRequired true
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=1&pageSize=20 with organizer Authorization bearer token
Find item matching participant registrationId in response items array
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; matching item has eligibility.result Eligible, non-empty reasonCode, and non-empty reasonText; completes Flow A organizer eligibility visibility step (AC-10a)

cases.title: Organizer lists NotEligible participants with attendance or feedback reason
preconditions: Completed event with mandatory feedback
At least one Attended participant without feedback submission
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.listEligibility for the event
Inspect entry for participant missing mandatory feedback
cases.expected: Entry shows eligibility.result NotEligible with reasonCode NOT_ELIGIBLE_FEEDBACK (or NOT_ELIGIBLE_ATTENDANCE for Absent) and explanatory reasonText visible to organizer (AC-10a)

cases.title: OrganizerStaff can list eligibility for assigned event
preconditions: Completed event with Attended/Absent registrations and evaluated eligibility
OrganizerStaff actor assigned to the event per scope rules
Staff JWT with event scope
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.listEligibility(eventId, { page: "1", pageSize: "20" }, organizerStaffContext)
cases.expected: Paginated items including Eligible and NotEligible rows with eligibility result and reason fields; scoped Organizer Staff list access per FR-21 and AC-10a

cases.title: Organizer eligibility page displays result badge, reason column, and segmented status filters
preconditions: Organizer logged in with access to a Completed event
At least one eligibility row exists with Eligible or NotEligible outcome
Event eligibility management page reachable at /organizer/events/{eventId}/eligibility
steps: Navigate to organizer event eligibility page
Observe table columns for Eligibility result and Reason
Switch segmented tabs for Eligible, NotEligible, PendingEvaluation, and Revoked if present
cases.expected: Table renders eligibility state badge and human-readable reasonText per page list §Eligibility management; segmented tabs map to eligibility query param and preserve server pagination (AC-10f, AC-14)

cases.title: Revoked eligibility appears in organizer list with override reason
preconditions: Completed event with previously Eligible participant
OrganizerAdmin revoked eligibility with reasonCode and reasonText
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Read certificate_eligibilities beforeState for revoked registrationId
Invoke eligibilityService.listEligibility with eligibility filter Revoked or unfiltered list
Locate revoked participant entry and compare afterState
cases.expected: Entry shows eligibility.result Revoked with admin-provided reasonCode and reasonText; overriddenBy populated per BR-20, FR-37, and domain lifecycle §6 Eligibility (AC-10d)

cases.title: GET eligibility with eligibility=Eligible filter returns only eligible rows
preconditions: Completed event with mix of Eligible and NotEligible participants
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?eligibility=Eligible&page=1&pageSize=20
Verify HTTP 200 and every item in response items array
cases.expected: HTTP 200; all returned items have eligibility.result Eligible; no NotEligible rows in filtered page (AC-10b)

cases.title: GET eligibility with eligibility=NotEligible filter returns only not-eligible rows
preconditions: Completed event with at least one NotEligible participant (e.g. missing mandatory feedback)
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?eligibility=NotEligible&page=1&pageSize=20
Verify every item in response
cases.expected: HTTP 200; all returned items have eligibility.result NotEligible with non-empty reason fields (AC-10b)

cases.title: Invalid eligibility filter value returns HTTP 400 INVALID_INPUT
preconditions: Completed event with eligibility records
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?eligibility=InvalidState&page=1&pageSize=20
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with INVALID_INPUT error code; no partial list data returned (AC-10b)

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET eligibility list returns HTTP 401
preconditions: Completed event with eligibility records
No Authorization header on request
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; organizer eligibility data not exposed (AC-10e)

cases.title: Participant cannot access organizer eligibility list endpoint
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated eligibility
Participant JWT for a registration on the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility with participant Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 forbidden; participant scoped to /eligibility/me only per permission matrix §2–§3 (AC-10e)

cases.title: OrganizerStaff outside event scope cannot list eligibility
preconditions: Completed event owned by another organization or unassigned to staff actor
OrganizerStaff JWT without scope to target eventId
steps: Invoke eligibilityService.listEligibility for out-of-scope eventId with staff context
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per assertEventScope; no cross-event eligibility data leakage (AC-10e)

cases.title: Eligibility list page beyond totalPages returns empty items with valid metadata
preconditions: Completed event with known total eligibility row count
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Call listEligibility with page=1 pageSize=1 to read total and totalPages
Call listEligibility with page exceeding totalPages
cases.expected: Beyond-last-page response has items: [], matching total and totalPages; pagination contract per AC-10c and API design §3

cases.title: Invalid pagination parameters on eligibility list return HTTP 400 INVALID_PAGINATION
preconditions: Completed event
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=0&pageSize=20
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=1&pageSize=101
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with INVALID_PAGINATION for sub-1 page or pageSize above max (100) per API design §3

cases.title: Every terminal eligibility list entry includes non-empty reason code and text
preconditions: Completed event with Eligible, NotEligible, and optionally Revoked participants
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: List all eligibility rows without filter
Inspect eligibility.reasonCode and eligibility.reasonText on each item with terminal result
cases.expected: All Eligible, NotEligible, and Revoked rows expose non-empty reasonCode and reasonText; INV-05 and BR-19 satisfied for organizer visibility (AC-10a)

cases.title: Eligibility list returns paginated envelope with correct total and page boundaries
preconditions: Completed event with multiple Attended/Absent registrations
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Call listEligibility with page=1 pageSize=1
Verify page, pageSize, total, totalPages, and items.length
cases.expected: Response matches pagination envelope contract; items.length <= pageSize; total reflects all finalized registrations eligible for evaluation; supports organizer operational browsing without unbounded payloads (AC-10c)

cases.title: List operation evaluates and persists missing eligibility before returning rows
preconditions: Completed event with Attended participant and no prior certificate_eligibilities row
OrganizerAdmin actor triggers first list access
steps: Invoke listEligibility for the event
Query certificate_eligibilities table for the registration
cases.expected: List entry includes evaluated Eligible or NotEligible with reason; row persisted in same request path per module transaction boundary and FR-21 first-list evaluation behavior; organizer sees current deterministic outcome

cases.title: Eligibility management page paginates server-side without unbounded client row render
preconditions: Completed event with more than 20 eligibility rows (exceeds default pageSize)
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin on /organizer/events/{eventId}/eligibility
steps: Navigate to organizer eligibility management page
Verify pagination controls and item range summary (e.g. Showing 1–20 of N)
Click Next to advance to page 2 and observe network requests
Count rendered table rows during and after navigation
cases.expected: Page renders at most pageSize eligibility rows with reason column; page change triggers single GET /events/{eventId}/eligibility with updated page parameter; rendered row count never exceeds pageSize; no unbounded full-dataset client render per AC-10f and page list §Eligibility management
